emails.subject: Candidate
emails.body: Candidate Kevin, I have worked with this guy at EBS for the past year and think he is a good candidate for the group. He has worked for Marcello Romano (he has a favorable view of him also). He traded oil products at Goldman a few years back and is interested in coming to the U.S. from our London office. Let me know what you think. Perhaps Louise can weigh in also if she knows him. John

emails.subject: RE: Candidate
emails.body: RE: Candidate Resume looks impressive. We should definitely interview him. I forwarded e-mail to Louise to see if she knows the guy from her London gas trading days. To: Presto, Kevin M.

emails.subject: RE: Candidate
emails.body: Kevin, Let me know your availability (and whoever else you think needs to interview him) and I can setup phone interviews.

emails.subject: RE: Candidate
emails.body: TJ has my calender. Just about any afternoon will work with this group.
